case_title: WESTLEY J FAURE ET AL VS. FRANCES FUNG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY FAURE, WESTLEY J FAURE, JENNY C. AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, FRANCES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WESTLEY J. FAURE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JENNY FAURE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCES FUNG IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
